records.question: Which episodes from season 9 or later of Law and Order have the title Bait, are exactly episode 3, have a number in the series of at least 184, and received at most 159 votes?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
WHERE episode.episode = 3 AND episode.title = 'Bait' AND episode.series = 'Law and Order' AND episode.number_in_series >= 184 AND episode.votes <= 159 AND episode.season >= 9
records.pred_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id
FROM Episode episode
WHERE episode.series = 'Law and Order'
  AND episode.season >= 9
  AND episode.title = 'Bait'
  AND episode.episode = 3
  AND episode.number_in_series >= 184
  AND episode.votes <= 159

records.question: Which episodes from the series Law and Order have associated keywords, awards, credits, and votes?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
JOIN keyword ON episode.episode_id = keyword.episode_id
JOIN award ON episode.episode_id = award.episode_id
JOIN credit ON episode.episode_id = credit.episode_id
JOIN vote ON episode.episode_id = vote.episode_id
WHERE episode.series = 'Law and Order'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT e.episode_id
FROM Episode e
WHERE e.series = 'Law and Order'
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Keyword k WHERE k.episode_id = e.episode_id)
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Award a WHERE a.episode_id = e.episode_id)
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Credit c WHERE c.episode_id = e.episode_id)
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Vote v WHERE v.episode_id = e.episode_id)

records.question: Which episodes that have related keywords, awards, credits, and votes have at most 199 votes, at least 23 episodes, and have won an award?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
JOIN keyword ON episode.episode_id = keyword.episode_id
JOIN award ON episode.episode_id = award.episode_id
JOIN credit ON episode.episode_id = credit.episode_id
JOIN vote ON episode.episode_id = vote.episode_id
WHERE episode.votes <= 199 AND episode.episode >= 23 AND award.result = 'Winner'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT e.episode_id
FROM Episode e
WHERE e.episode_id IN (SELECT episode_id FROM Keyword)
  AND e.episode_id IN (SELECT episode_id FROM Award WHERE result = 'Won')
  AND e.episode_id IN (SELECT episode_id FROM Credit)
  AND e.episode_id IN (SELECT episode_id FROM Vote WHERE votes <= 199)
  AND e.number_in_series >= 23

records.question: What episodes titled Refuge: Part 2 have exactly 204 votes and feature an uncredited director who won a Silver Gavel Award?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT episode.episode_id FROM episode
JOIN credit ON episode.episode_id = credit.episode_id
JOIN person ON credit.person_id = person.person_id
JOIN award ON person.person_id = award.person_id
WHERE credit.role = 'director' AND episode.votes = 204 AND award.award_category = 'Silver Gavel Award' AND credit.credited = 'false' AND award.result = 'Winner' AND episode.title = 'Refuge: Part 2'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT e.episode_id
FROM Episode e
WHERE e.title = 'Refuge: Part 2'
AND e.votes = 204
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Credit c
    WHERE c.episode_id = e.episode_id
    AND c.category = 'director'
    AND c.credited = 'uncredited'
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM Award a
        WHERE a.person_id = c.person_id
        AND a.episode_id = e.episode_id
        AND a.award = 'Silver Gavel Award'
    )
)
